title: Anthropic is having a moment in the private markets; SpaceX could spoil the party
content: Glen Anderson, president of Rainmaker Securities, says the secondary market for private shares has never been more active — with Anthropic the hottest trade around, OpenAI losing ground, and SpaceX's looming IPO poised to reshape the landscape.

title: Employers use your personal data to figure out the lowest salary you'll accept
content: Companies leverage personal information in salary negotiations to minimize compensation offers

title: OpenAI executive shuffle includes new role for COO Brad Lightcap
content: In addition to Lightcap's new role, OpenAI CMO Kate Rouch will be stepping away from the company to focus on cancer recovery.

title: Anthropic ramps up its political activities with a new PAC
content: With the midterms right around the corner, the new group is positioned to back candidates who support the AI company's policy agenda.

title: OpenAI acquires TBPN, the buzzy founder-led business talk show
content: TBPN, Silicon Valley's cult-favorite tech podcast, will operate independently, even as it's overseen by chief political operative Chris Lehane.

title: Can orbital data centers help justify a massive valuation for SpaceX?
content: On the latest episode of TechCrunch's Equity podcast, we debated Elon Musk's vision for data centers in space.
